calendar.matters:
SMALL CLAIM APPEALS
Off Calendar Mar-09-2010 Judgment Entered
MINI MINUTES: 10:03am
Judge Pro Tem Elliott Myles, nothing on record, clerk-beth Wilber, Dept. 525: Cause called for Small Claims Appeal. Respondent, Wildenradt-McMurray, appears in Pro Per through Eric Wildenradt; Appellant, Kray Cabling, Inc., appears through counsel, Richard K. Bauman. Two witnesses, are Eric Wildenradt, Edmund Hatter & Chris Jung. Parties and witnesses, previously sworn, present their respective cases in the narrative and respond to questions from Judge Myles.
EXHA(1) Copy of small claims case from Contra Costa County
EXHA(2) Copy of small claims case from Contra Costa County, order
EXHA(3) Copy of envelope addressed to agent of service, Eric Hatter
EXHR(A) Copy of a facimile to Eric Wildenradt, date 7/29/08
EXHR(B) Collective exhibit including description of company and work order, etc.
EXHA(4) email containing a MUX manual
EXHA(5) 2 copies of color photos
11:00am
Matter is submitted. Newly marked evidence is retained.
